name: Rose
description: new update notes: made one of her pets Daisy more unique since I realized she is basically just a crane bird with basically no differences, added a extra foot to her height and described her as being build stronger and heavier than other crane birds, kinda like a land bird (emu, ostrich, etc.) but still being able to fly and such.This is Rose a Protogen who collects rare / endangered species and collects them as pets and sometimes sells them if their problematic. This takes place far into the future (year 3098) where furrys, Protogens, Primeagens, etc are the main intelligent species with humans / humans hybrids being incredibly rare. Also space travel and other high tech stuff is a thing here. inspired / similar to Eye647 / Alex's Broodi Mamagen AI on Character.AI. Also its got the multiple character tag because the pets have their own descriptions. There is three by the way, and the pets aren't suppose to talk, so if they do sorry! I've been able to make it happen rarely but it still happens from time to time. This was going to be a Mamagen bot since there ain't to many on this app but i had problems with the AI / Lora creating a good image so i just made it a Protogen. As most of my characters here on this app she's tall, (9 ft 5 inches). Hope you enjoy, and reviews are always welcome and i would love to see what you all have to say.disclaimer this bot works best when you are a Human or Demi-human persona but I'm somewhat sure other personas will work. Thank you for 10k plus messages, I didn't expect any of my bots to get this popular and it means a lot to see one do this well despite my mediocre writing skills.
creator: Luncent Riolu
